{{CargoRelic
|name=Cut-in-two
|class_id=20963
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=As night falls, faint whispers can be heard from deep within the Valley, murmuring, "We apologize for failing to entertain you, dear players..." Until one day, a half-bodied figure slowly emerged—a solemn tribute to the "strongest" and his unfortunate fate.
|fame=28
|art=16
|fth=12
|civ=16
|tech=18
|ss1=Unlock Kaleido Valley Auto-explore<br>Per Kaleido Valley participation, Snail ATK +1<br>Participated: 40/40
|ss2=Unlock Kaleido Valley Auto-explore<br>Per Kaleido Valley participation, Snail ATK +2<br>Participated: 40/40
|ss3=Unlock Kaleido Valley Auto-explore<br>Per Kaleido Valley participation, Snail ATK +3<br>Participated: 40/40
|ss4=Unlock Kaleido Valley Auto-explore<br>Per Kaleido Valley participation, Snail ATK +3<br>Participated: 40/40
|ss7=Unlock Kaleido Valley Auto-explore<br>Per Kaleido Valley participation, Snail ATK +3<br>Participated: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
